title: The Torn Page
description: Mixing, selling, and debunking records all point toward a single pair. Deduce what potion they produce.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing1 and ing6, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing1=R- (ing1+ing7=R-: both share R-), ing6=R+ (ing6 has R+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing1=G- (ing1+ing2=G-: both share G-), ing6=G+ (ing6 has G+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing1=B- (ing1+ing4=B-: both share B-), ing6=B+ (ing6 has B+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  All colours opposite → neutral.
